title: ELEGANT BABY Sleepy Owl Grey Wicker Moses Basket with Full Bedding Set, Adjustable Hood, Fibre Mattress & Padded Liner
features: ✔ 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐭 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐁𝐚𝐛𝐲: The soft and cushioned interior of the wicker moses basket ensures a cosy and comfortable spot for your baby. In this baby wicker Moses basket with a hooded sunshade your baby will feel snug and secure while you attend to their needs.

✔ 𝐖𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐢𝐬 𝐈𝐧𝐜𝐥𝐮𝐝𝐞𝐝: This wicker Moses basket is the perfect starter bed set for your little one. Each bundle includes a wicker Moses basket, fibre mattress, padded liner, complete bedding set including full body surround, adjustable hood, and padded quilt.

✔ 𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐲 𝐭𝐨 𝐀𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐦𝐛𝐥𝐞: Setting up a Moses basket set is a breeze, with no tools required. It conveniently disassembles for storage or travel. The lightweight design of the Moses basket bedding makes it perfect for your baby.

✔ 𝐇𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐜𝐫𝐚𝐟𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲: Elegant baby moses basket is lovingly handcrafted with attention to detail, ensuring its durability and uniqueness. You can trust in its quality to stand the test of time and serve you for years.

✔ 𝐂𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐫 𝐒𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐬𝐟𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧: We believe in providing the best care to our customers by providing stylish and high-quality products. Our wicker Moses basket bedding is made with high-quality materials. We are at your service in case of any queries related to the product.
description: Suitable from newborn, the wicker Moses basket is the perfect starter bed for your little one and will send them to sleep in next to no time. This wicker Moses basket features a high quality embroidered owl design which will be a great edition for any household or nursery. The bedding and padded quilt are made from our luxury easy care polycotton material and has a soft padding surround for added protection and comfort. This basket also includes a comfortable mattress that you can be certain your baby will sleep peacefully at night on. This newborn baby Moses basket comes with an adjustable hood, perfect to create a cosy sleeping space for your precious little one. The hood can be adjusted & tightened using the fasteners on either side. The mattress is water resistant and breathable allowing easy air movement and heat dissipation around your baby's body keeping them cosy all night long. The Moses basket mattress cover is also washable, just in case of any accidents. It has a beautiful and classic natural finish which is perfect for any nursery. Our Moses basket will ensure safe and sound sleeping for you and your infant. WARNING: This product is suitable only for a child who cannot sit unaided, roll over and cannot push themselves up on its hands and knees. This product should not be used as a carrycot. Under no circumstances should you carry your baby in the Moses basket. Handles are for easy portability of the Moses Basket only. Maximum weight of child: 9kg.
